narrative:
New Franklin 2-C (precinct in Summit County) has 840 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
